mapper.select: SELECT AGENT_SHOP_CD AS value, AGENT_SHOP_NM AS label FROM MSF_AGENT_SHOP_INFO WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY AGENT_SHOP_NM
SELECT KT_ORG_ID , ORGN_NM , ROADN_ADR_ZIPCD , ROADN_ADR_BAS_SBST , ROADN_ADR_DTL_SBST FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST@DL_MSP WHERE 1=1 AND ORGN_ID = #{cntpntShopId} AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT COLUMN_NAME , METAROW , METALINE , APP_KEY , CODEDATA , CODEDATA_YN , PAGEINDEX , DELETECOLUMNYN FROM MSF_APPLICATION_FORM_INFO ORDER BY PAGEINDEX, APP_KEY

SELECT A.GROUP_CODE , B.PAGE_SEQ , C.PAGE_CODE , C.COLUMN_NAME , C.METAROW , C.METALINE , C.CODEDATA , C.CODEDATA_YN , C.DELETECOLUMNYN , C.APP_KEY FROM MSF_APP_GROUP_MST A , MSF_APP_GROUP_INFO B , MSF_APP_FORM_INFO C WHERE A.STATUS = 'A' AND A.GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode} AND A.GROUP_CODE = B.GROUP_CODE AND B.STATUS = 'A' AND B.PAGE_CODE = C.PAGE_CODE ORDER BY B.PAGE_SEQ, C.APP_KEY
SELECT PAGE_CODE , COLUMN_NAME , METAROW , METALINE , CODEDATA , CODEDATA_YN , DELETECOLUMNYN , APP_KEY FROM MSF_APP_FORM_INFO WHERE PAGE_CODE = #{pageCode} ORDER BY APP_KEY
SELECT MRC.CSTMR_NM , MQ.RES_NO , MQ.AGENT_CD , MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_CD FROM MSF_REQUEST MQ , MSF_REQUEST_CSTMR MRC WHERE MQ.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND MQ.REQUEST_KEY = MRC.REQUEST_KEY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_COMMEND ( REQUEST_KEY , RES_NO , COMMEND_ID , APPLY_YN , LINK_TYPE_CD , OPEN_MTHD_CD , COMMEND_SOC_CODE_01 , COMMEND_SOC_CODE_02 , COMMEND_SOC_CODE_03 , SYS_RDATE , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{requestKey} , #{resNo} , COMMEND_ID , 'N' , COALESCE(LINK_TYPE_CD, '01') , OPEN_MTHD_CD , COMMEND_SOC_CODE_01 , COMMEND_SOC_CODE_02 , COMMEND_SOC_CODE_03 , NOW() , NOW() FROM MSF_COMMEND_ID_MNG WHERE COMMEND_ID = #{commendId}
mapper.select: SELECT LST_COM_ACTV_DATE FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND ROWNUM = 1
